headline: Intuitive Surgical Upgraded to Buy by Citi — Plus Key Moves on Stryker and Abbott
summary: Citi is making a clear statement about the health of U.S. medical technology heading into the spring: the sector’s fundamentals remain intact, even as broader market volatility has dragged down some of the industry’s strongest names. On Wednesday, the firm upgraded Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) to Buy from Neutral, opened a 90-day catalyst watch on Stryker ... Intuitive Surgical Upgraded to Buy by Citi — Plus Key Moves on Stryker and Abbott

headline: Intuitive Surgical Poised for Growth in 2026 on da Vinci 5 Momentum

headline: Intuitive Surgical - Strong Moat But Valuation Remains Elevated, Hold
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) remains the robotic-assisted surgery market leader, with Q4 procedures up 18% and revenue rising 19% to $2.87 billion.

summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading flat as we hit the mid-point of the trading week, and while we didn’t see the snapback rally that was the star of the show Monday, at least all four major indices held their own as the conflict in Iran grinds on. headline: Citigroup Upgrades Intuitive Surgical to Buy, Maintains Price Target to $590
